title: Gamemode Detector
description: Shows when a player switches gamemodes
body: This mod shows you whenever a *player switches gamemodes*, with a neat little notification. [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) is required to change any of the settings, like chat notifications, or regular notifications. You can use this, for example, to see when an SMP owner is cheating, and many more.
